comment: Per-chunk gzip-size ceilings in bytes. CI runs scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs after `vite build` and fails the build if any chunk exceeds its budget by >10% (the slop in `slopPercent`). Budgets are sized 5% above the current measured chunks so non-trivial growth is what triggers the alert, not noise from a dependency point-update. Update the numbers here when a deliberate feature lands that grows a chunk — the diff in this file is what reviewers see. Last re-pinned Session 108 against measured chunks of commit `43a6a94`: flow 105 KB → 110 KB ceiling; index 118 KB → 124 KB; icons 9.8 KB → 10.5 KB.
